label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, let's try to figure this out. So, there are five dancers: Alice, Bob, Claire, Dave, and Eve. Each of them has a partner at the start. Their partners are: - Alice with Lola - Bob with Karl - Claire with Patrick - Dave with Sam - Eve with Helga Then there are a series of partner switches. Let me track each step carefully. Let me maybe write down each step and update the pairings after each switch. Starting positions: Alice - Lola Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Sam Eve - Helga First switch: Dave and Alice switch partners. So Dave was with Sam and Alice was with Lola. After switching, Dave will be with Lola and Alice will be with Sam. So after first switch: Alice - Sam Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Lola Eve - Helga Second switch: Eve and Alice switch partners. Eve is currently with Helga and Alice is with Sam. So after switching, Eve will be with Sam and Alice will be with Helga. So after second switch: Alice - Helga Bob - Karl Claire - Patrick Dave - Lola Eve - Sam Third switch: Bob and Dave switch partners. Bob is with Karl and Dave is with Lola. After switching, Bob will be with Lola and Dave
